docs.title: fluxopt-plot
docs.text:
Interactive plotly visualization for fluxopt energy system models.

Early development

This package is experimental — the API may change between releases.

docs.title: Quick start
docs.text:
from fluxopt_plot import PlotAccessor

# After solving a fluxopt model:
# accessor = PlotAccessor(result)

docs.title: fluxopt_plot.PlotAccessor
docs.text:
PlotAccessor(result: Any)

Accessor providing plot methods for a fluxopt Result.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default result Any

A solved fluxopt Result object.

required Source code in src/fluxopt_plot/accessor.py 
def __init__(self, result: Any) -> None:
    self._result = result
